title: SDKError
description: Error object thrown by Push Chain SDK operations

message.description: Human-readable error message describing what went wrong
examples: UEA not deployed yet for this account
Read-only client cannot perform signing operations

code.description: Error code for programmatic handling - inferred, not explicitly documented

cause.description: Original error that caused this error, if applicable. Can be an Error object or any value.

notes: Error structure is inferred from standard JavaScript Error patterns. Push Chain SDK may have specific error types but they are not explicitly documented.

readOnlyRestriction.message: Read-only client cannot perform signing operations
readOnlyRestriction.description: Thrown when attempting to sign or send transactions with a read-only client initialized with UniversalAccount instead of UniversalSigner

verificationDeclined.description: User declined to sign the transaction

progressErrorEvents.description: Errors can also be surfaced via progressHook with level: 'ERROR'
